title: The Wacky World of Mother Goose
writer: Arthur Rankin Jr., Romeo Muller, Charles Perrault
actors: Margaret Rutherford, Bob McFadden, Susan Melvin
plot: Animated feature film based on Charles Perrault's stories and nursery rhymes. It features Humpty Dumpty, The Old Woman Who Lives in a Shoe, and the Crooked Man.
